ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the log entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "am_stress" INTEGER /* Stress level in the morning */,
  "am_hunger" INTEGER /* Hunger level in the morning */,
  "am_sleep" INTEGER /* Sleep quality in the morning */,
  "am_sleep_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours slept in the morning */,
  "am_weight" INTEGER /* Weight in the morning */,
  "pm_stress" INTEGER /* Stress level in the evening */,
  "eve_stress" INTEGER /* Stress level at the end of the day */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes of a specific health condition */,
  "breakfast_calories" INTEGER /* Calories consumed during breakfast */,
  "lunch_calories" INTEGER /* Calories consumed during lunch */,
  "dinner_calories" INTEGER /* Calories consumed during dinner */,
  "snack_calories" INTEGER /* Calories consumed during snacks */,
  "total_calories" INTEGER /* Total calories consumed during the day */,
  "water_intake" INTEGER /* Amount of water consumed during the day */,
  "steps_taken" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the day */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered during the day */,
  "exercise_type" TEXT /* Type of exercise performed during the day */,
  "exercise_duration" TEXT /* Duration of exercise performed during the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_logs" (
  "weight_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the weight log entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weight log entry */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the user on the given date */,
  "percent_change_from_prev_week" REAL /* Percentage change in weight from the previous week */,
  "percent_change_from_prev_day" REAL /* Percentage change in weight from the previous day */,
  "muscle_mass" REAL /* Muscle mass of the user on the given date */,
  "body_fat_percentage" REAL /* Body fat percentage of the user on the given date */,
  "bone_density" REAL /* Bone density of the user on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weight_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., weight, exercise, sleep) */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the goal */,
  "goal_progress" REAL /* Progress made towards the goal */,
  "goal_status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, achieved, not achieved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the reminder */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g., medication, exercise, meal) */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of day for the reminder */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the reminder (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "reminder_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the reminder */,
  "reminder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social connection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the connection */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was connected with */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., friend, group) */,
  "connection_status" TEXT /* Status of the connection (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_connections_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_connections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the friendship */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was befriended */,
  "friendship_status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of group (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the group */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Status of the membership (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
